results.rendered_html:
tūrṇa p. p. [tvar-bhāvekta]
1 Quick, speedy, rapid.
2 Fleet.
— rṇaṃ Rapidity, quickness.
— rṇaṃ ind. Quickly, speedily; cūrṇamānīyatāṃ tūrṇaṃ pūrṇacaṃdranibhānane  Subhāṣ.
